author: kopperp
body:
Eigen 3.5.0/5.0.0 added the necessary device header for CMSSW. Test to see if the CMS eigen fork can be dropped in favor of upstream.

**Note:**
Eigen 3.5.0/5.0.0 made fixed size matrices and arrays [trivially_default_constructible](https://gitlab.com/libeigen/eigen/-/merge_requests/1696). This uncovered two unused Eigen::Vector/Matrix variables in RecoTracker/PixelTrackFitting and is fixed in [CMSSW!51453](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51453).
title: eigen: Update to upstream version 5.0.1
